title: Approval Design in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger approval design in practice judgment so ai / automation work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Approval Design in Practice is a leverage point inside ai / automation. It supports the broader goal of workflow automation, copilots, agentic systems, and leverage through tooling.
coreConcepts: Approval Design in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good approval design in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Approval Design in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
